name: ConstructionLine
summary: The ConstructionLine class contains methods for modifying construction lines. Construction lines can be infinite in length, semi-infinite (i.e. infinite in one direction) or finite.

methods.name: reverse!
methods.summary: The reverse! method is used to reverse the direction of the construction line.
methods.remarks: The reverse! method is used to reverse the direction of the construction line.

properties.name: direction
properties.summary: The direction method retrieves a 3D vector in the direction of the construction line.
properties.remarks: The direction method retrieves a 3D vector in the direction of the construction line.

properties.name: end
properties.summary: The end method retrieves the end point of a construction line in the form of a 3D point.
properties.remarks: The end method retrieves the end point of a construction line in the form of a 3D point. If the construction line is infinite at the end, this returns nil.

properties.name: position
properties.summary: The position method is used to retrieve a 3D point used to create a construction line on an infinite construction line.
properties.remarks: The position method is used to retrieve a 3D point used to create a construction line on an infinite construction line.

properties.name: start
properties.summary: The start method is used to retrieve the starting point of a construction line.
properties.remarks: The start method is used to retrieve the starting point of a construction line. If the construction line is infinite at the start, this returns nil.

properties.name: stipple
properties.summary: The #stipple method is used to retrieve the stipple pattern used to display the construction line.
properties.remarks: The #stipple method is used to retrieve the stipple pattern used to display the construction line.
